image_prompt: Create a premium editorial hero image for AI Tool Pick's review of Testimonial. The image must visibly include the actual product name and actual tool name 'Testimonial' on a laptop or app interface. Make it recognisably about this exact product, not a generic AI dashboard. Show the product-specific concept: customer testimonial collection and video proof. Use the site's premium dark, cream and orange visual style, realistic SaaS dashboard details, clean composition, no generic abstract blobs, no random brand names.
